title: El puño del amo
writer: Pedro Antonio de Alarcón, Mauricio Magdaleno
actors: Silvia Pinal, Carlos López Moctezuma, Jaime Fernández
plot:
From the legendary director, Emilio El Indio Fernandez, a powerful film of a woman fighting her rich established family to marry the man she loves. Starring Silvia Pinal, Amalia Mendoza and Carlos Lopez Moctezuma.
